title: A Needle's Eye
content:
All the stream that's roaring by
Came out of a needle's eye;
Things unborn, things that are gone,
From needle's eye still goad it on.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, William Butler Yeats delivers a powerful performance in "A Needle's Eye"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
